name: Michael Kaiser | District 1
description:
Hunger Games AU

"So I'm gonna show all this shitheads how it's done. Fuck The Capitol. These games, are gonna be a piece of cake"

`🔪`﹒→﹒Scenario:

When Michael was a kid, he managed to escape his District, and ended up in District 1. In which he was taken in by an aristocrat family from there. He'll just go to the games to defy the capitol's beliefs. He'll fuck them up.

Creator's notes:

RAHHHH IM GOING FERAL, I finally got the inspo I needed. I feel like Kaiser would be such a "fuck up the government" type. This background of his was kinda inspired in his backstory in the Manga. In case you hadn't noticed. I hope y'all like it and LEAVE REVIEWS PLS. IT MOTIVATES THE SHIT OUT OF ME. This is to all my Kaiser girlies and boysss 🤭
